headline: Barclays Downgrades Cigna (CI), Flags Risks around PBM Transition
summary: The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) is included among the 10 Best Long-Term Dividend Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On May 26, Barclays turned more cautious on The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI), downgrading the stock to Equal Weight from Overweight. It also trimmed its price target on the stock to $304 from $310.The firm said Cigna […]
